executiveSummary.headline: The model and TEPCO performed similarly.
executiveSummary.summary: 24 comparable hours were available. Model MAE was 214.0 MW, TEPCO MAE was 187.9 MW. WAPE was 0.78% for the model and 0.68% for TEPCO.

rootCauseHypotheses.title: Peak timing was missed.
rootCauseHypotheses.explanation: The model peak hour differed from the actual peak hour. Review weather deltas and lag shape around the peak.

featureRecommendations.suggestion: Review the impact of temp_delta_1h based on the hypothesis: Peak timing was missed.
featureRecommendations.expectedEffect: Check whether MAE, WAPE, and RMSE improve together under repeated hour-band and business-type conditions.
featureRecommendations.risk: Overfitting a single-day pattern can cause over-correction in other seasons or day types.
featureRecommendations.validationPlan: Compare WAPE, RMSE, and max error against TEPCO using recent 2-4 week replay and backtests.

operatorNotes: featureRecommendations are review candidates and are never applied automatically.
